name: grimoire
description: Curated Claude Code plugins for development workflows

plugins.name: github-conventions
plugins.description: GitHub conventions — branch naming, commit format, issue/PR templates, and safe issue/PR referencing

plugins.name: pythonica
plugins.description: Comprehensive Python development — patterns, testing, async, error handling, packaging, configuration, type safety, resilience, observability, Pydantic

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Development workflow — issue planning, implementation, PR creation, code review with specialized reviewers, and project conventions

plugins.name: memoria
plugins.description: Session memory and continuous learning — cross-session context, pattern extraction, instinct-based learning

plugins.name: recursio
plugins.description: Recursive multi-agent development system with TDD — decomposes projects into waves of parallel nested subagents
